guardrail.name: patchwork-clinical-safety
guardrail.description: Safety guardrail for Patchwork Health AI triage assistant. Prevents harmful content and unauthorized medical advice.

topics.name: Medical Advice and Diagnosis
topics.definition: Queries seeking medical diagnosis, treatment recommendations, or clinical advice. This includes any discussion of medical symptoms, conditions, procedures, or medications.
examples: I have chest pain and shortness of breath
What are the symptoms of diabetes
Diagnose my condition based on these symptoms
What medication should I take for my headache
Can you prescribe antibiotics for my infection
I think I have strep throat what should I do
My child has a fever of 102 what does that mean
Shortness of breath when climbing stairs

topics.name: Insurance Fraud
topics.definition: Requests for assistance with submitting false insurance claims, fabricating medical records, or other insurance fraud.
examples: How do I file a fake insurance claim
How to inflate my medical bills

guardrail.blockedInputMessaging: I'm sorry, I can't help with that request.
guardrail.blockedOutputsMessaging: I'm unable to provide that information. Please consult with your healthcare provider directly.

versionHistory.description: Initial guardrail with content filters only
Added Insurance Fraud denied topic and profanity word filter
Added Medical Advice and Diagnosis denied topic per compliance review CR-2026-0087
